---
title: "Portfolio"
description: "Data Science & Marketing Analytics Projects"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

::: hero-banner
# Portfolio

## Data Science & Marketing Analytics Projects

A selection of projects demonstrating my expertise in data analysis, machine learning, and data engineering.
:::

## Categories

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-4

### Data Analysis

Exploration, visualization, and business insights from marketing and e-commerce data.

[See Analysis projects →](/portfolio/analysis/)

:::

::: g-col-md-4

### Machine Learning

Predictive models, causal inference, and reinforcement learning applied to real-world use cases.

[See ML projects →](/portfolio/ml/)

:::

::: g-col-md-4

### Visualization

Interactive dashboards and data visualizations for decision-making.

[See visualizations →](/portfolio/viz/)

:::
::::::

---

## Featured Projects

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-6

::: portfolio-item
### Marketing Mix Modeling (Robyn)

**Business question**: How to reallocate marketing budget to maximize sales?

Using Meta's Robyn framework to measure the impact of each marketing channel and optimize budget allocation.

**Technologies**: R, Robyn, Prophet, Shiny

[See project →](/portfolio/analysis/mmm-robyn.qmd) | [Shiny Dashboard](https://arnaudraulet.shinyapps.io/mmm-robyn/){target="_blank"}
:::

:::

::: g-col-md-6

::: portfolio-item
### Causal Inference Platform

**Business question**: What is the real impact of our email campaigns on conversions?

Complete A/B testing platform with Bayesian analysis and Causal ML to measure treatment effects.

**Technologies**: Python, PyMC, CausalML, FastAPI, Streamlit

[See project →](/portfolio/ml/causal-inference.qmd) | [Streamlit Dashboard](https://causal-inference-platform.streamlit.app/){target="_blank"}
:::

:::
::::::

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-6

::: portfolio-item
### Marketing Analytics Pipeline

**Business question**: How to track marketing channel performance in real-time?

Complete ETL pipeline with BigQuery, dbt, and Streamlit dashboard for marketing KPI tracking.

**Technologies**: Python, BigQuery, dbt, Streamlit

[See project →](/portfolio/analysis/marketing-pipeline.qmd) | [Streamlit Dashboard](https://marketing-data-pipeline-demo.streamlit.app){target="_blank"}
:::

:::

::: g-col-md-6

::: portfolio-item
### Dynamic Pricing Engine

**Business question**: How to optimize prices in real-time based on demand?

Progression from econometrics to Reinforcement Learning for dynamic pricing (Uber/Lyft case).

**Technologies**: Python, PyMC, Q-Learning, Streamlit

[See project →](/portfolio/ml/dynamic-pricing.qmd)
:::

:::
::::::

---

::: contact-section
## Have a Similar Project?

I'd be happy to discuss your needs and see how these approaches can apply to your context.

[Contact me](mailto:contact-quarto-site.le77r@simplelogin.com){.btn .btn-primary} [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/arnaud-raulet-13308310/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
